description: If you expect your footwear to be extremely comfortable coupled with great looks, you've come to the right place! These thongs from crocs pamper your feet all day long as you go about doing your daily chores with even greater enthusiasm. Pair them with just about any kind of casual wear for a fab look.UpperEVA upper in thong design with textured inside for lightweight feel, comfort and durabilityEVA material that moulds to the shape of the feet offering ergonomic comfortBranding button on upper for styleMidsoleEVA footbed with horizontal and lines in the silhouette of the foot for ergonomic comfort and acupressureCrocs branding on mid heel for comfort and styleFungus, bacteria and odour resistant for a healthy wear even in wet conditionsMild heel cup on the footbed to support the heelOutsoleSlip resistant outsoleMulti-directional textured leaf-shaped grooves in the forefoot and backfoot for ample grip, stability and comfortshoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
